stemHtml:
Refer to figure or Flight Planning Manual MRJT 1 Figure 4.5.1).
Find: Time, Fuel, Still Air Distance and TAS for an enroute climb 280/0.74 to FL350. Given:

Brake release mass 64 000 kg
ISA -10° C
Airport elevation 3000 ft

options.a: 24 min, 1850 kg, 139 Nautical Air Miles NAM, 383 kt
options.b: 24 min, 1775 kg, 139 Nautical Air Miles NAM, 383 kt
options.c: 24 min, 1850 kg, 148 Nautical Miles NM, 391 kt
options.d: 24 min, 1950 kg, 139 Nautical Air Miles NAM, 383 kt
